synthesis_report: Balanced synthesis: In Dhoni’s absence, CSK are likely to hand the wicket-keeping gloves to India opener Sanju Samson, who is considered the former India captain’s successor at the Panaji: Rohit Monserrate will continue as mayor, and Vasant Agshikar will be appointed as the next deputy mayor of the Corporation of the City of Panaji (CCP).
